c.d: Total number of users actively using the platform monthly for live streaming
c.s: App analytics platforms, company reports, market research

c.d: Comprehensiveness and quality of live streaming tools including video quality, interactive features, and streaming stability
c.s: App store reviews, feature documentation, user testing

c.d: Number and variety of revenue generation methods available for streamers including donations, subscriptions, ads, virtual gifts
c.s: Platform documentation, creator programs, revenue sharing policies

c.d: Effectiveness of the platform's algorithm in promoting live content and helping streamers reach new audiences
c.s: Creator feedback, engagement metrics, platform studies

c.d: Ability to stream simultaneously to multiple platforms or integrate with other social media and streaming services
c.s: Feature lists, third-party integrations, API documentation
